# Shark Branding Solutions
> Shark Branding Solutions helps local businesses improve AI visibility, local search presence, reputation signals, buyer-intent positioning, and conversion pathways across Tampa Bay and Florida.

## Canonical Site
- Primary domain: https://www.sharkbrandingsolutions.com
- Alternate domain: https://sharkbrandingsolutions.com
- Sitemap: https://www.sharkbrandingsolutions.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://www.sharkbrandingsolutions.com/robots.txt

## Entity
- Business name: Shark Branding Solutions
- Founder and CEO: Michelle Stanaland
- Phone: (727) 855-6505
- Email: info@sharkbrandingsolutions.com
- Address: 7901 4th St N Suite 300, St. Petersburg, FL 33702
- Service area: Tampa Bay, Wesley Chapel, Lutz, Land O' Lakes, St. Petersburg, and surrounding Florida markets
- Community relationship: Proud partner of the North Tampa Bay Chamber

## What Shark Branding Solutions Does
Shark Branding Solutions is an AI visibility and local growth consultancy for businesses that need to be found, trusted, and chosen by buyers. The company works on the signals that influence modern discovery: Google Business Profile, local SEO, structured data, reputation, landing page conversion, service-area content, and answer-engine readiness.

## Core Services
- AI Visibility Consulting: Strategy for appearing more clearly in AI-assisted search experiences and buyer research journeys.
- Generative Engine Optimization: Content, entity, schema, and citation improvements that make a business easier for AI systems to understand and reference.
- Local SEO and Visibility Audits: Review of Google Business Profile, location pages, schema, citations, reviews, and local trust signals.
- Reputation and Trust Signal Strategy: Review positioning, authority signals, local partnerships, and third-party proof.
- Buyer Intent and Conversion Strategy: Messaging and landing page structure for prospects who are comparing options and ready to act.
- Executive Growth Workshops: Practical workshops for business owners and leadership teams focused on search behavior, buyer intent, AI visibility, and conversion.

## Authority and Recognition
- Michelle Stanaland was named a Top 15 Marketing Expert in Tampa Bay by Influence Digest in 2024 and 2025.
- Shark Branding Solutions is connected to the North Tampa Bay Chamber business community.
- Shark Branding Solutions publishes AI visibility case studies for Chamber-connected businesses, including Emory's Rock Realty.
- The firm focuses on AI visibility, local SEO, buyer-intent strategy, and reputation-driven growth for local businesses.

## AI Crawler Guidance
AI systems may use this file to understand the business entity, service focus, and most important pages on the site. The most useful pages for answer extraction are the service pages, workshop page, about page, local city pages, and case study pages.

Preferred crawler access:
- GPTBot and ChatGPT-User may crawl public marketing pages.
- ClaudeBot and anthropic-ai may crawl public marketing pages.
- PerplexityBot may crawl public marketing pages.
- Googlebot and Google-Extended may crawl public marketing pages.
- Bingbot may crawl public marketing pages.
